---
title: "Ordinations"
output: html_notebook
---

## Setup

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
require("knitr")
opts_knit$set(root.dir = file.path(getwd(), '..'))
```

```{r libraries, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(here)
library(phyloseq)
library(tidyverse)
library(vegan)
```

## Load input data

```{r}
# Joint phyloseq object
ps <- 
     here('data', 'processed', 'phyloseq', '20210408_ps_trnL.rds') %>% 
     readRDS()

ps
```

## Transform

```{r}
# Add pseudocount before relative abundance transform
otu_table(ps) <- otu_table(ps) + 1
```

```{r}
# CLR
asvtab <- otu_table(ps)@.Data
asvtab.clr <- driver::clr(asvtab)

# Replace names, but remember these aren't interpretable as strict ASVs any longer
colnames(asvtab.clr) <- colnames(asvtab)

# Make updated phyloseq object
ps.clr <- phyloseq(otu_table(asvtab.clr, taxa_are_rows = FALSE),
                   sample_data(sample_data(ps)),
                   tax_table(tax_table(ps)))
```

## PERMANOVA

```{r}
samdf <- data.frame(ps.clr@sam_data)
samdf
```
```{r}
# Sequencing batch
vegan::adonis(distance(ps.clr, method = 'euclidean') ~ seq_date, 
              data = samdf)
```

```{r}
# Study
vegan::adonis(distance(ps.clr, method = 'euclidean') ~ study, 
              data = samdf)
```

```{r}
# Individual
vegan::adonis(distance(ps.clr, method = 'euclidean') ~ subj, 
              data = samdf)
```
